title: Zwift Race Prep: Pen Start Simulation
description: Survive the opening surge of virtual races
purpose: Survive the opening surge of virtual races

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 75%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/9. 30s at 200%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/9. 170-200% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Alternating. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/9. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/9. 0:30 at 200%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 0:30 at 200%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 7 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 17% through session. Block 1/3. You've done 0min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 3:00 at 100%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/3. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/3. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/9. 5:00 at 85%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 22% complete. Rep 3/9. 85% at 88-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/9. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/9. 85% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 18 minutes of work done. 37 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 30% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/9. 0:30 at 200%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 38% complete. Rep 4/9. 200% at 82-90 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 23 minutes of work done. 36 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 4/9. 200% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/9. 200% FTP, 82-90 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 24 minutes of threshold work done. Block 2/3. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/3. 100% at 82-90 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 2/3. 100% for 3:00. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 2/3.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/3. 100% FTP, 82-90 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/9. 5:00 at 85%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 85%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 44% done. 3 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 85% × 5:00. Seated, 82-90 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 52% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 5:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 23 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 61% done. 2 intervals left. 23 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 7. 17min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 61% done. 2 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 7/9. 37 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 2 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 7. 2 to go. 23 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 61% complete. Block 3/3. This is where you prove you're serious.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue building. 17min threshold work accumulated. Maintain 75-85 rpm — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 blocks to go. 20 minutes. This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 61% done. This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: 61% complete. 100% for 3:00. Don't let power spike. Stay smooth.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 85% for 5:00. Then 15min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 85% × 5:00. Then 15min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 5:00 at 85%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 85% for 5:00. Then 15min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 85% × 5:00. Seated, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 75% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 75% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 50 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 83% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 50 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 10:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
